# Delivery Report Template

> Use for recurring mission reporting. Keep it evidence-based and short enough for a steering committee pre-read.

## 1. Header

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Client | `[client name]` |
| Mission | `[mission title]` |
| Period | `[yyyy-mm-dd to yyyy-mm-dd]` |
| Overall status | `[green / amber / red]` |
| Prepared by | `[owner]` |

## 2. Executive Status

| Dimension | Status | Comment |
|---|---|---|
| Scope | `[green/amber/red]` | `[comment]` |
| Planning | `[green/amber/red]` | `[comment]` |
| Budget | `[green/amber/red]` | `[comment]` |
| Quality | `[green/amber/red]` | `[comment]` |
| Risks | `[green/amber/red]` | `[comment]` |

## 3. Delivered This Period

| Deliverable | Evidence | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `[deliverable]` | `[link, demo, test, artifact]` | `[done/partial]` |

## 4. Decisions And Arbitrations

| Decision needed | Options | Recommendation | Due date |
|---|---|---|---|
| `[decision]` | `[A/B/C]` | `[recommended option]` | `[date]` |

## 5. Risks And Issues

| Type | Description | Impact | Owner | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Risk | `[future uncertainty]` | `[impact]` | `[owner]` | `[plan]` |
| Issue | `[current blocker]` | `[impact]` | `[owner]` | `[plan]` |

## 6. Next Period Plan

| Priority | Work item | Expected evidence |
|---|---|---|
| P0 | `[critical item]` | `[evidence]` |
| P1 | `[important item]` | `[evidence]` |
| P2 | `[optional item]` | `[evidence]` |

## 7. Ask From Client

| Ask | Why it matters | Owner | Needed by |
|---|---|---|---|
| `[ask]` | `[impact if late]` | `[owner]` | `[date]` |

## 8. Appendix

- Links to demos, dashboards, logs, decision records and accepted deliverables.
- Changelog since previous report.
- Detailed burndown or budget view, if needed.
